series_metadata.series_title: County Auditor Continuing Education Status Report
series_metadata.series_description: Form(s) submitted by Ohio County Auditors verifying continuing education credits in accordance with ORC 319.04(A).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 2 years after audited ; Paper: Retain while needed then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
